browserTraversal.requestUiStatus: Если адрес зарегистрирован — мы отправили инструкции по сбросу пароля.
browserTraversal.confirmUiStatus: Пароль изменён — войдите с новым паролем.

finding.actualBeforeFix: The live SMTP message linked to the internal API origin http://127.0.0.1:4190.
finding.expected: The message must link to the browser application origin http://127.0.0.1:3180.
finding.rootCause: buildResetUrl used context.req.url after the Next.js API rewrite instead of the already validated browser Origin header.
finding.fix: Use the trusted browser Origin and retain request-origin fallback for server-to-server calls.

postFixEvidence.apiRegression: apps/api/src/authRegistrationRoutes.test.ts: 17/17 passed; separate app and API origins resolve the reset URL to the app origin.
postFixEvidence.browserRoute: The in-app browser loaded /password-reset/confirm?token=<64 hex> after a clean Next.js route rebuild.
postFixEvidence.smtpRuntime: The combined Auth + Shell run received delivery=email from the SMTP-enabled API.
postFixEvidence.providerRereadback: A second real message was requested after the fix. REG.RU IMAP does not retain routed messages locally; routing forwards them to Gmail. Computer Use stopped before a second Gmail content readback, so no second mailbox-content claim is made.
